title: reconnect_sse doc omits caller obligation for returned receiver
description: reconnect_sse() in client_task.rs documents the return as 'Returns (new_handle, new_rx)' but does not state that the caller must replace both sse_handle AND sse_rx — specifically that sse_rx must be replaced so that the select\! arm reads from the new channel, not the old one. A contributor refactoring the reconnect path who wires only new_handle and forgets new_rx will select on the abandoned channel (which will immediately return None since new_tx dropped when the old task was aborted), triggering an infinite reconnect loop with no error. Fix: expand the doc to say 'The caller must assign both return values: sse_handle = new_handle and sse_rx = new_rx. Failing to replace sse_rx causes the select\! arm to read from the closed old channel.'
